comment.body: Alma, do you use the Kolmogorov forward and backward equations for the probability distributions and estimations for intraday? And (hypothetically) if someone were to first start using them without past data but current and future data added on, would they be more inaccurate at first and then be tuned (in terms of weights/variables) to become better as time went on and they evolved (assuming you didn't have the past data to work with but only present and the subsequent future data)
